turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I just can't seem to get over the loss of my grandmother. It feels like it's been a year but only yesterday...

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: I'm really sorry to hear that you're struggling with those feelings. Grief can be so intense and it often doesn't follow a linear timeline.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yeah, I feel like I should be further along in the grieving process by now. It's just hard not to compare myself to others who seem to have moved on.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: It's completely normal to feel that way. Grieving is a very personal and complex process. Sometimes it helps to talk about your feelings with someone you trust.
